parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
class Composite {
  + add(component:Component):void
  + remove(component:Component):void
  + getChild():int
  + operation():void
}
note left of Composite::add
  组合可以操作子节点或者叶子节点，但可能不具有叶子节点的某些行为
end note

abstract class Component {
  + add(component:Component):void
  + remove(component:Component):void
  + getChild():int
  + operation():void
}
note left of Component::add
  Component 为所有节点的基类，不管是普通节点还是叶子节点
end note

class Leaf {
  + operation():void
}
note left of Leaf::operation
  叶子节点，不能操作子节点
end note

class Client

abstract class OrganizationComponent {
  + add(component:OrganizationComponent):void
  + print():void
}

class University
class College
class Department

Composite --|> Component
Composite o--> Component
Leaf --|> Component

Client ..> OrganizationComponent

University --|> OrganizationComponent
University o--> OrganizationComponent
College --|> OrganizationComponent
College o--> OrganizationComponent
Department --|> OrganizationComponent

@enduml
```
